business.headline: Sensex closes over 500 points lower as SBI tumbles nearly 7% after Q4 resultsBenchmark indices closed sharply lower on Thursday after SBI's weaker-than-expected Q4 results hit banking shares. The decline reflected caution around crude oil prices, West Asia tensions and the broader earnings season.

Sensex sinks 600 points: Why is the stock market falling today?Benchmark indices fell sharply on Thursday as higher crude prices, foreign selling and weak banking stocks hit sentiment. Investors stayed cautious ahead of key Q4 results, with traders watching US-Iran tensions and oil moves.

I broke my FD 3 times: When it helped and when it hurtA fixed deposit feels safe because it is supposed to sit quietly in the background, growing slowly over time. But when life throws sudden surprises, that safety net often becomes the first thing people reach for. The real question is, when does breaking an FD actually make sense, and when does it backfire?

Think PAN is needed only for ITR Filing? 7 transactions where you must quote itPAN has quietly become one of the most important financial documents in India today, but are you aware that many banking, investment and cash transactions cannot be completed without quoting it?

8th Pay Commission: The family unit formula behind salary revisions of govt employeesEmployee unions have urged the 8th Pay Commission to revisit the family unit formula used to fix salaries. Any revision could raise basic pay, allowances, pensions and the broader compensation bill. But what exactly is the 'family unit' formula?

Tata Trusts board meeting postponed amid Tata Sons governance, listing discussionsTata Trusts has postponed a crucial board meeting scheduled for today to May 16, as governance disputes, Tata Sons board representation, listing discussions and leadership questions continue to draw attention across corporate India.

Lenskart shares fall over 2% amid block deal buzz, IPO lock-in expiryLenskart shares fell in Thursday's trade as block deal chatter coincided with the expiry of its IPO lock-in period. The move put the spotlight on possible supply pressure even as analysts said fundamentals remain unchanged.

Sensex opens 400 points lower, Nifty slips below 24,200 as banking stocks dragThe BSE Sensex fell 422.11 points, or 0.54%, to 77,422.41 in early trade. The NSE Nifty50 slipped 129 points to 24,197.65, falling below the 24,200 mark.

Why is Maharashtra's Rs 100 Will registration move getting so much attention?Anyone who owns assets such as a flat, land, jewellery, fixed deposits, shares or mutual funds should consider making a Will. Even small savings can become the reason for family disagreements if there is no clear-written instruction from the owner.

Pronto bags fresh $20 million funding, valuation jumps to $200 millionPronto offers quick home services such as laundry, kitchen preparation and home cleaning, with services starting from Rs 125. Workers are available within 15 minutes through the platform.

Stock market ends flat as Sensex slips 114, Nifty stays above 24,300Benchmark equity indices ended little changed on Wednesday, with the Sensex slipping 114 points and the Nifty holding above 24,300. The muted session underlined investor caution over global cues, interest rate expectations and earnings momentum, while selective buying capped losses.

Can senior citizens above skip ITR filing in FY27? Here's who qualifiesFiling income tax returns every year can be stressful for many elderly taxpayers. But did you know some senior citizens above 75 may not need to file ITR in FY27 at all if certain conditions are met?

Bought a car above Rs 10 lakh? You may be missing this tax creditCar buyers paying over Rs 10 lakh are being reminded to check the 1% TCS collected at purchase. The credit, linked to PAN records, can reduce tax dues or increase refunds at ITR filing.

Ex-CJI DY Chandrachud to mediate Sunjay Kapur family feud between mother, widowThe Supreme Court has pushed for a settlement in the Sunjay Kapur family trust dispute, with former CJI DY Chandrachud stepping in as mediator after both sides agreed to explore resolution through mediation.

DA hike explained: Why bank employees just got 0.70% while govt staff received 2%?A small DA hike for bank staff and a bigger one for government employees, has raised eyebrows. But is the difference unfair, or is there more to the calculation behind the scenes? Let us know here.

Explained: Why Paytm share price surged over 6% todayPaytm shares rose over 6% after One 97 Communications reported a Q4 profit and its first annual profit. The results signalled improving payments growth and margins even as regulatory concerns remained in focus.

Sensex, Nifty edge higher as softer crude lifts Dalal Street moodThe BSE Sensex rose 27.75 points, or 0.04%, to 77,986.27 in early trade, while the Nifty 50 gained 19.30 points, or 0.08%, to trade at 24,350.25 around 9:30 am.

8th Pay Commission: Govt employees push for 5-year pay hikes. Is it practical?As part of its exclusive 8th Pay Commission coverage, IndiaToday.in spoke to union leaders demanding salary revisions every five years. We also asked experts whether such a move would help employees or strain government finances further.

8th Pay Commission opens next round of employee consultations. Check key datesIn its latest circular dated May 6, 2026, the Commission said it will meet unions and associations linked to the Defence and Railway sectors in Delhi on May 13 and 14, 2026.

Can the US CLARITY Act finally bring clear rules to the crypto industry?For years, crypto has grown fast but without clear rules. The US CLARITY Act aims to fix that gap. Will it finally bring order to the digital asset space?

entertainment.headline: Aashka Goradia and Brent Goble welcome second baby boy, reveal his adorable name TV actor Aashka Goradia and husband Brent Goble have welcomed their second baby boy. The actor shared a heartwarming family picture and expressed gratitude on the social media.

Looks like he's 25 again: Hrithik Roshan's viral wedding dance sparks nostalgia Hrithik Roshan was seen dancing to the title track of Kaho Naa... Pyaar Hai at a wedding in Suryagarh. The video sparked nostalgic reactions online as fans praised his energy, expressions and grace.

Dhurandhar 2 completes 50 days of box office carnage, endless global records Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge has completed 50 days in theatres with Rs 1,791.55 crore worldwide. Its sustained run and record haul have pushed it to No. 2 among Indian films globally.

Success is certain: Vijay's post for students amid Tamil Nadu political buzz TVK battles the numbers game in Tamil Nadu and Vijay makes a post about the Class 12 exam. Can the message about "victory" and "certain success" be read as more than just advice for students?

Tanishaa Mukerji recalls Bigg Boss trauma: People went after Kajol, Ajay and family Tanishaa Mukerji opened up about her difficult experience on Bigg Boss 7. Calling the reality show "traumatic," she shared that contestants used the names of Kajol and Ajay Devgn for screen time.

Gullak Season 5: Anant V Joshi replaces Vaibhav Raj Gupta as Annu Mishra Gullak is returning to SonyLIV for its fifth season with Anant V Joshi joining as Anand 'Annu' Mishra. The casting marks a new phase for Annu while bringing the Mishra family back on screen.

Uri actor Riva Arora alleges harassment by delivery man, files complaint Actor Riva Arora has alleged that a Blinkit delivery to her Mumbai home escalated into a prolonged verbal confrontation. The episode led her family to call the police and file a complaint with the company.

When Thalaivi stopped Thalaivaa: The Jayalalithaa vs Vijay showdown In 2013, Vijay's film Thalaivaa was delayed in Tamil Nadu during a standoff with the Jayalalithaa government over its tagline. What was the line? And how did the controversy end? With the episode resurfacing after his 2026 election win, we revisit what happened.

Lukkhe review: Punjab's rap wars get a stylish, emotionally bruised spin with KingRelease Date:Fri May 08, 2026 Lukkhe series review: Prime Video's Lukkhe follows a troubled hockey player into Punjab's rap-crime underworld. The series pairs neon swagger with a tender look at addiction and masculinity.

Sonam Kapoor calls Anand Ahuja her calm in chaos in romantic anniversary note Sonam Kapoor marked eight years of marriage and a decade with Anand Ahuja by sharing unseen family photographs and a personal note. Her message traced their years across cities, homes, parenthood and the life they built together.

Inside Ramayana: Yash shoots Ravana's Shiva dhanush moment on massive swayamvar set Yash is filming Ravana's arrival and failed bow-lift at Sita's swayamvar for Ramayana in Mumbai. The sequence marks a key narrative turn and is being mounted on a grand Mithila set.

Shakti Kapoor reacts strongly to death hoax, vows complaint against rumour-mongers Shakti Kapoor has dismissed viral fake reports of his death and said he is healthy and happy. He said he would complain against those spreading the hoax and urged people to verify information before sharing it.

Amul salutes Karan Johar's Met Gala 2026 debut with viral topical ad Amul has paid tribute to Karan Johar after his Met Gala 2026 debut in New York. The gesture amplified a fashion moment shaped by Indian art and quickly drew attention online.

The clash fed into the wider argument over whether the film targets Pakistanis rather than Muslims or pushes a political message.

Thalapathy's Big Five: Revisiting the Tamil films that made Vijay the icon he is From romance and sports dramas to action-packed entertainers, these five Vijay films not only ruled the box office but also shaped his journey into becoming Thalapathy for millions of fans.

The Batman Part 2: Matt Reeves teases first look, hints at snowy Gotham Matt Reeves has shared a teaser image of the Batmobile from The Batman: Part 2 on X. The post points to a winter setting as the sequel moves towards its 2027 release.

Vijay may be short of majority, but Tamil Nadu already crowned its CM emotionally When Vijay entered politics, he did not just ask Tamil Nadu for votes, he asked for emotional trust. And even though the numbers are stopping him from forming the government for now, a large section of the state already seems to have accepted him as its Chief Minister emotionally.

Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce dine at Indian restaurant for date night in London Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce were seen leaving Gymkhana in London after dinner. The outing has revived unconfirmed talk around an upcoming wedding.

general news.headline: Vijay gets the magic number to form govt as VCK, Congress, Left rally behind TVKWith Congress, VCK, CPI and CPI(M) backing TVK, Vijay now appears to have crossed the majority mark in the fractured Tamil Nadu Assembly.

Live: Vijay seeks meeting with Governor at 4.30 pm as TVK secures majority 118Tamil Nadu Government Formation News Live Updates: Tamil Nadu's post-election political situation continues to remain fluid, with parties weighing their options as uncertainty persists over government formation. DMK spokesperson TKS Elangovan said the party has not discussed any alliance with the AIADMK and would wait until May 10, the deadline reportedly given by the Governor, to see whether TVK chief Vijay can secure majority support. He indicated the DMK would consult allies only if alternative political arrangements become necessary. Amid speculation over possible realignments, AIADMK dismissed reports of a DMK-AIADMK understanding as "just rumours." Meanwhile, VCK leader Sinthanai Selvan criticised TVK's approach to alliance-building, accusing some party functionaries of political arrogance and warning that opposition unity was essential to prevent what he described as BJP-backed Governor's rule. Congress MP Manickam Tagore also attacked the BJP, alleging attempts to delay the formation of a government despite what he claimed was a clear public mandate in favour of TVK. Stay tuned to IndiaToday.in for the latest updates.

Is a small error by Vijay behind the big delay in becoming CM?Vijay has been turned back by the Governor twice after the TVK emerged as the single largest party in its debut Tamil Nadu election. A possible technical error may have emerged as Vijay's hurdle in TVK's bid to form the government.

Live: Bengal likely to get 2 Deputy Chief Ministers, including a womanWest Bengal CM Announcement Live Updates: Union Home Minister Amit Shah is in Kolkata to meet BJP's newly elected MLAs and is expected to decide the party's chief ministerial face. Will it be Suvendu Adhikari or someone else? Follow this space for updates on the high-stakes political suspense, as well as the probe into the killing of Adhikari's personal assistant, with the newly formed SIT now stepping in amid escalating post-poll violence.

Op Sindoor is ongoing. And so is this operation for the last 42 yearsIndian military commanders have repeatedly reminded us that Operation Sindoor against Pakistan is still on. There's another Indian military operation against Pakistan which has been going on for 42 years. Operation Meghdoot, which began in April 1984 in one of the world's harshest battlefields, doesn't have an end date. Here's why.

Rain on its way: Signal from Australia hints monsoon on track to IndiaThunderstorms are crackling over Tamil Nadu and Kerala, with heavy rain warnings in place across south India. When is monsoon coming?

How Vijay holds all the cards even if DMK, AIADMK join handsEven if the DMK and the AIADMK come together to block Vijay's path to power, the TVK chief might still emerge the real winner. This is how Vijay can turn a number deficit into a narrative advantage and reshape Tamil Nadu politics in the long term.

The world's loudest commentator on foreign wars is silent when the wreckage carries an American flag.

From dragon fruit farming to CM reckoning: Dilip Ghosh's Bengal comeback storyLeading Bengal CM face Dilip Ghosh told IndiaToday.in that Mamata Banerjee turned "netas into goondas and goondas into netas," but said the BJP may later admit "useful" leaders. He called for Mamata's party to be uprooted, accused her of undermining democratic institutions, and said the party's priority would be restoring law and order.

What is Claude thinking? Anthropic may have found the answerAnthropic says it may have found a way to understand what its AI model Claude is "thinking" internally. The company's new system translates hidden AI activation patterns into readable text, which allows it to study reasoning, planning and even safety risks happening behind the scenes of AI while the chatbot processes prompts.

Did he say b***h? Trump's hot-mic moment as journalist asks 'stupid question'The heated exchange took place on Thursday when Trump made a surprise visit to the National Mall, where restoration work is being carried out at the Reflecting Pool ahead of the country's 250th anniversary celebrations.

Then lists all internal issuesUddhav Sena MP Sanjay Raut has written to Donald Trump objecting to his message congratulating Narendra Modi on the BJP's West Bengal victory. He said allegations around the conduct of the polls should be examined before such endorsements are made.

sports.headline: MS Dhoni named as highest individual taxpayer in Bihar-Jharkhand region MS Dhoni has again been named the highest individual taxpayer in the Bihar-Jharkhand region for 2025-26. The announcement underlines his enduring commercial pull even as questions over his IPL future continue.

Gavaskar calls for major cricket rule tweak, urges Ganguly to help pacers Former India captain Sunil Gavaskar urged former India skipper Sourav Ganguly, who currently chairs the ICC Men's Cricket Committee, to consider changes to the wide bouncer rule to give fast bowlers more leeway in modern-day cricket.

Surya likely to lose India T20I captaincy, Shreyas frontrunner to take over BCCI are likely to discuss India's T20I captaincy in the upcoming selection meeting, with Suryakumar Yadav's place under threat and Shreyas Iyer emerging as the frontrunner to take over.

Not money or parades, just want to know India is watching us: Satwik Satwiksairaj Rankireddy has clarified that his remarks after India's Thomas Cup bronze were about recognition, not personal fame. He said silent receptions for such achievements can discourage athletes and called for equal support across sports.

Rishabh Pant's final over dilemma: Why Digvesh was picked over Shahbaz Ahmed LSG vs RCB: With 20 runs to defend, Rishabh Pant faced a huge final-over call between Shahbaz Ahmed and Digvesh Rathi. He backed mystery over experience, and the gamble paid off for LSG.

Now or never for misfiring DC as rejuvenated KKR await in must-win showdown IPL 2026, DC vs KKR Preview: Home has turned into anything but a safe haven for a struggling Delhi Capitals side, which heads into Friday's must-win clash against Kolkata Knight Riders with its IPL 2026 campaign hanging by a thread.

Is Varun Chakravarthy's IPL blip a case of T20 World Cup fatigue?KKR bowling coach Dwayne Bravo feels Varun Chakravarthy may still be feeling the effects of India's hectic T20 World Cup-winning campaign. Bravo said the mystery spinner probably needed a proper mental and physical break before IPL 2026.

How Prince Yadav used Virat Kohli's advice against him to stun RCB legendIPL 2026, LSG vs RCB: Prince Yadav revealed he used advice from Virat Kohli himself to dismiss the batting star for a two-ball duck in Lucknow Super Giants' 9-run (DLS) win over the Royal Challengers Bengaluru at the Ekana Stadium.

WADA rule for retired athletes raises questionOlympian Vinesh Phogat's proposed return to competition at the Gonda ranking tournament remains clouded by uncertainty over WADA's six-month notice rule for retired athletes. IPL likely to expand to 94 games from 2028, says league chairman Arun DhumalThe BCCI is planning a 94-match IPL from 2028 while retaining 10 teams. The shift depends on a longer ICC window and aims to simplify the format for fans and broadcasters, league chairman Arun Dhumal said.

Valverde taken to hospital after spat with TchouameniSpanish reports said Federico Valverde was taken to hospital after a training-ground altercation with Aurelien Tchouameni at Real Madrid. Suryakumar Yadav and wife Devisha Shetty welcome baby girlIPL 2026: Suryakumar Yadav and Devisha Shetty have welcomed a baby girl during the IPL season. The news has drawn wishes from across cricket and left Mumbai Indians awaiting clarity on his next-game availability.

England captain Ben Stokes ready to bowl on cricket comeback from injuryBen Stokes is expected to contribute with both bat and ball for Durham as the England captain returns to competitive action for the first time since England's disastrous Ashes campaign.

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna.
